English item: I am the life of the party.
中文題面: 我是派對中的靈魂人物。

English item: I feel little concern for others.
中文題面: 我覺得自己很少關心別人。

English item: I am relaxed most of the time.
I have difficulty understanding abstract ideas.
中文題面: 我對於理解抽象概念有困難。
我和其他人在一起時感覺自在。

English item: I make a mess of things.
中文題面: 我常把事物弄得一團糟。

English item: I am not interested in abstract ideas.
中文題面: 我對抽象概念不感興趣。

English item: I am not interested in other people's problems.
中文題面: 我對別人的問題不感興趣。

English item: I get chores done right away.
中文題面: 我會立即將日常家務做完。

English item: I often forget to put things back in their proper place.
I do not have a good imagination.
I talk to a lot of different people at parties.
中文題面: 在聚會中我會跟許多不同的人說話。

English item: I am not really interested in others.
I change my mood a lot.
I am quick to understand things.
I don't like to draw attention to myself.
中文題面: 我不喜歡引起別人對自己的注意。

English item: I take time out for others.
中文題面: 我總會為別人抽出時間。
我的心情時常起伏不定。

English item: I don't mind being the center of attention.
中文題面: 我不介意成為注目的焦點。
我總是按照預定計畫行事。

English item: I spend time reflecting on things.

中文題面: 我和陌生人相處時顯得安靜。

English item: I make people feel at ease.
I am exacting in my work.
中文題面: 我對我的工作要求嚴謹。
